name: simple-target-defaults
note: 简单模式等价：单 target，全部默认值（max_duration/shell/cwd/expected_exit/repeat/三个空数组）
yaml:
schema_version: 1
goal_id: payment-tests
task: Fix failing tests in the payment module
base_commit: a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0
budgets:
  max_iterations: 25
evals:
  - id: payment-tests
    role: target
    command: [npm, test, --, payment]
    timeout_seconds: 600
expected_canonical: {"base_commit":"a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0","budgets":{"max_duration_seconds":3600,"max_iterations":25},"evals":[{"command":["npm","test","--","payment"],"cwd":".","expected_exit":0,"id":"payment-tests","repeat":1,"role":"target","shell":false,"timeout_seconds":600}],"goal_id":"payment-tests","manual_review":[],"out_of_scope":[],"protected_paths":[],"schema_version":1,"task":"Fix failing tests in the payment module"}

name: complex-full-fields
note: 复杂：invariant + setup + shell:true + manual/out_of_scope/protected_paths + cwd/repeat/expected_exit
yaml:
schema_version: 1
goal_id: payment-api-migration
task: Migrate payment to the new API and keep contract tests passing
base_commit: a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0
budgets:
  max_iterations: 30
  max_duration_seconds: 5400
setup:
  - npm ci
protected_paths:
  - tests/payment/acceptance/**
evals:
  - id: contract-tests
    role: target
    command: [npm, test, --, contract]
    cwd: packages/payment
    timeout_seconds: 600
    repeat: 2
  - id: typecheck
    role: invariant
    command: [npx, tsc, --noEmit]
    timeout_seconds: 300
    expected_exit: 0
  - id: e2e-shell
    role: target
    shell: true
    command: npm run test:e2e -- payment | tee /dev/null
    timeout_seconds: 900
manual_review:
  - Confirm the public payment API remains source-compatible
out_of_scope:
  - Performance tuning beyond passing tests
expected_canonical: {"base_commit":"a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0","budgets":{"max_duration_seconds":5400,"max_iterations":30},"evals":[{"command":["npm","test","--","contract"],"cwd":"packages/payment","expected_exit":0,"id":"contract-tests","repeat":2,"role":"target","shell":false,"timeout_seconds":600},{"command":["npx","tsc","--noEmit"],"cwd":".","expected_exit":0,"id":"typecheck","repeat":1,"role":"invariant","shell":false,"timeout_seconds":300},{"command":"npm run test:e2e -- payment | tee /dev/null","cwd":".","expected_exit":0,"id":"e2e-shell","repeat":1,"role":"target","shell":true,"timeout_seconds":900}],"goal_id":"payment-api-migration","manual_review":["Confirm the public payment API remains source-compatible"],"out_of_scope":["Performance tuning beyond passing tests"],"protected_paths":["tests/payment/acceptance/**"],"schema_version":1,"setup":["npm ci"],"task":"Migrate payment to the new API and keep contract tests passing"}

name: uppercase-short-sha
note: 大写短 SHA：normalize 只做小写化，不解析补全（补全在 lifecycle 层，另有 p1 测试）
yaml:
schema_version: 1
goal_id: short-sha
task: Uppercase short sha is lowercased by normalize
base_commit: A1B2C3D
budgets:
  max_iterations: 5
evals:
  - id: t
    role: target
    command: [bash, check.sh]
    timeout_seconds: 60
expected_canonical: {"base_commit":"a1b2c3d","budgets":{"max_duration_seconds":3600,"max_iterations":5},"evals":[{"command":["bash","check.sh"],"cwd":".","expected_exit":0,"id":"t","repeat":1,"role":"target","shell":false,"timeout_seconds":60}],"goal_id":"short-sha","manual_review":[],"out_of_scope":[],"protected_paths":[],"schema_version":1,"task":"Uppercase short sha is lowercased by normalize"}

name: key-order-and-comments
note: 键序打乱 + 注释：hash 必须与 simple-target-defaults 完全一致
yaml:
# comment at top
task: Fix failing tests in the payment module
evals:
  - timeout_seconds: 600  # inline comment
    command: [npm, test, --, payment]
    role: target
    id: payment-tests
budgets:
  max_iterations: 25
base_commit: a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0
goal_id: payment-tests # trailing comment
schema_version: 1
expected_canonical: {"base_commit":"a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0","budgets":{"max_duration_seconds":3600,"max_iterations":25},"evals":[{"command":["npm","test","--","payment"],"cwd":".","expected_exit":0,"id":"payment-tests","repeat":1,"role":"target","shell":false,"timeout_seconds":600}],"goal_id":"payment-tests","manual_review":[],"out_of_scope":[],"protected_paths":[],"schema_version":1,"task":"Fix failing tests in the payment module"}

name: scalar-quoting-edges
note: YAML 标量类型边角：带引号的数字/布尔字符串参数必须保持字符串
yaml:
schema_version: 1
goal_id: scalar-edges
task: Quoted scalars stay strings
base_commit: a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0
budgets:
  max_iterations: 5
evals:
  - id: t
    role: target
    command: [node, script.js, "1", "true", "007"]
    timeout_seconds: 60
